creator: vlada@devnull.cz
text:
I moved the ipv6gen project over to Github, the following updates needs to be made:

pkg-descr - change URL to https://github.com/vladak/ipv6gen/wiki/IPv6-prefix-generator
Makefile - change MASTER_SITES to point to Github, EXTRACT_SUFX to .tar.gz
distinfo - change SHA256 digest to aaf0638ba78eac56b667f504433580b9edba43e861d7d8596091c8542313583b and size to 12978 (to match https://github.com/vladak/ipv6gen/archive/1.0.tar.gz)

Thanks.
